col.name: study_name
description: Canonical study identifier (for example EinsteinA_YYYY).

col.name: subject_id
description: Unique identifier for a participant within a study.

col.name: sample_id
description: Unique identifier for a biospecimen/sample.

col.name: curator
description: Name(s) of curator(s) responsible for this entry.

col.name: pmid
description: PubMed identifier of the primary publication for the study.

col.name: subcohort
description: Identifier for a subset of the study cohort.

col.name: target_condition
description: Primary phenotype(s) or condition(s) investigated in the study. Ontology seed term URLs: https://identifiers.org/NCIT:C7057 ; https://identifiers.org/EFO:0000408.

col.name: control
description: Case-control role of the sample in the study.

col.name: country
description: Country where the participant resides and/or the sample was collected. Ontology seed term URL: https://identifiers.org/NCIT:C25464.

col.name: body_site
description: Anatomical body site from which the sample was collected.

col.name: body_site_details
description: More specific anatomical subsite for sample collection than body_site. Ontology seed term URL: https://identifiers.org/UBERON:0001062.

col.name: days_from_first_collection
description: Days elapsed since the first collection time point in longitudinal studies.

col.name: lifestyle
description: Lifestyle category (primarily used for traditional or non-westernized populations).

col.name: location
description: Free-text additional location detail (for example city or region).

col.name: probing_pocket_depth
description: Tooth surface/region where periodontal pocket depth was measured.
allowedvalues: Buccal surface|Distal surface of tooth|Lingual surface of tooth|Mesial surface of tooth

col.name: westernized
description: Whether the participant is classified as westernized.

col.name: antibiotics_exclusion_period
description: Minimum washout period from antibiotic use required by study criteria.

col.name: antibiotics_exclusion_period_unit
description: Unit used for `antibiotics_exclusion_period`.

col.name: probing_pocket_depth_value
description: Numeric probing depth measurement corresponding to `probing_pocket_depth`.

col.name: dna_extraction_kit
description: Name of the DNA extraction kit or protocol used.

col.name: ncbi_accession
description: NCBI SRA/ENA accession(s) associated with the sample or run.

col.name: sequencing_platform
description: Sequencing platform/instrument used to generate the data.

col.name: age
description: Participant age in the unit specified by `age_unit`.

col.name: age_group
description: Age group classification: Newborn (< 1 month/28 days), Infant (>= 1 month & < 2 yrs), Child (>= 2 yrs & < 11 yrs), Adolescent (>= 11 yrs & < 18 yrs), Adult (>= 18 yrs & < 65 yrs), Elderly (>= 65 yrs)

col.name: age_unit
description: Unit used to report `age`.

col.name: ancestry
description: Broad ancestry category inferred from genetic/genomic data (children of HANCESTRO:0004). Ontology seed term URL: https://identifiers.org/HANCESTRO:0004.

col.name: ancestry_details
description: More specific ancestry term(s) typically descendants of the selected ancestry category. Ontology seed term URL: https://identifiers.org/HANCESTRO:0004.

col.name: family
description: Family identifier when multiple related participants are included.

col.name: family_role
description: Participant role within the family (for family-based sampling).

col.name: sex
description: Biological sex of the subject

col.name: zigosity
description: Twin zygosity status.

col.name: age_min
description: Minimum possible age. For samples only with 'age_group' information, this represents the definition of a given age group. For specific age information, 'age_min' and 'age_max' are identical.

col.name: age_max
description: Maximum possible age. For samples only with 'age_group' information, this represents the definition of a given age group. For specific age information, 'age_min' and 'age_max' are identical.

col.name: age_years
description: Age in years

col.name: antibiotics_current_use
description: Whether the participant is currently using antibiotics.

col.name: bmi
description: Body mass index (BMI; EFO:0004340) calculated as weight (kg) divided by height squared (m²).

col.name: dietary_restriction
description: Dietary regime (partial match to SNOMED:182922004 or SNOMED:162536008)

col.name: disease
description: Reported disease or condition term(s) for the participant; use Healthy when no target condition is detected. Ontology seed term URLs: https://identifiers.org/NCIT:C7057 ; https://identifiers.org/EFO:0000408.

col.name: disease_details
description: More specific disease or condition term(s) for the participant; use Healthy when appropriate. Ontology seed term URLs: https://identifiers.org/NCIT:C7057 ; https://identifiers.org/EFO:0000408.

col.name: disease_response_orr
description: Overall response rate (ORR; NCIT:C96613) indicator for treatment response.

col.name: disease_response_pfs
description: Progression Free Survival (PFS, EFO:0004920): Progression free survival is a measurement from a defined time point e.g. diagnosis and indicates that the disease did not progress i.e. tumours did not increase in size and new incidences did not occur. PFS is usually used in analyzing results of treatment for advanced disease.

col.name: disease_response_pfs_month
description: Progression-free survival follow-up time in months.

col.name: disease_response_recist
description: Response Evaluation Criteria in Solid Tumors (RECIST, DICOM:112022): Standard parameters to be used when documenting response of solid tumors to treatment; a set of published rules that define when cancer patients improve (`respond`), stay the same (`stable`), or worsen (`progression`) during treatments. (from www.recist.com)
allowedvalues: RECIST Complete Response|RECIST Partial Response|RECIST Progressive Disease|RECIST Stable Disease

col.name: feces_phenotype
description: Stool-related phenotype or clinical measurement type.
allowedvalues: Bristol stool form score (observable entity)|Calprotectin Measurement|Harvey-Bradshaw Index Clinical Classification

col.name: fmt_id
description: Study-specific identifier assigned to FMT participants.

col.name: fmt_role
description: Role in fecal microbiota transplantation (donor or recipient before/after procedure).

col.name: hla
description: Human leukocyte antigen (HLA) typing information. Ontology seed term URL: https://identifiers.org/MRO:0001676.

col.name: neonatal_birth_weight
description: Birth weight (EFO:0004344) recorded in grams.

col.name: neonatal_delivery_procedure
description: Delivery method at birth (NCIT:C81179).
allowedvalues: Elective Cesarean Delivery|Emergency Cesarean Delivery|Cesarean Section|Vaginal Delivery

col.name: neonatal_feeding_method
description: Infant feeding method(s) during early life.
allowedvalues: Mixed Feeding|Exclusively Breastfeeding|Exclusively Formula Feeding|No Breastfeeding

col.name: neonatal_gestational_age
description: Gestational age at birth (EFO:0005112) in weeks.

col.name: neonatal_preterm_birth
description: Birth when a fetus is less than 37 weeks and 0 days gestational age (NCIT:C92861).

col.name: obgyn_birth_control
description: Whether oral contraceptive birth control is currently used.

col.name: obgyn_lactating
description: An indication that the subject is currently producing milk. (NCIT:C82463)

col.name: obgyn_menopause
description: Menopausal status of the participant. Ontology seed term URL: https://identifiers.org/NCIT:C106541.

col.name: obgyn_pregnancy
description: Current pregnancy status of the participant.

col.name: smoker
description: Tobacco smoking status/history; use `Non-smoker (finding)` only when past smoking history is unavailable.

col.name: treatment
description: Treatment(s) or medication(s) administered to the participant. Dynamic ontology seed term URL: https://identifiers.org/NCIT:C1908.

col.name: tumor_staging_ajcc
description: American Joint Committee on Cancer (tumor staging) (SNOMED:258236004). A system to describe the amount and spread of cancer in a patient's body

col.name: tumor_staging_tnm
description: Tumor-node-metastasis (TNM) tumor staging system (tumor staging) (SNOMED:254293002).A system to describe the amount and spread of cancer in a patient's body

col.name: biomarker_name
description: A measurable and quantifiable characteristic or substance that serves as an indicator of a biological state, condition, or process within an organism.

col.name: biomarker_unit
description: Unit for biomarker

col.name: biomarker_value
description: Value for biomarker

col.name: disease_response_os
description: Overall survival duration (time to death from any cause; NCIT:C125201).

col.name: disease_response_os_unit
description: Unit used to report `disease_response_os`.

col.name: ecog_performance_status
description: A performance status scale designed to assess disease progression and its affect on the daily living abilities of the patient.  (NCIT:C105721)
allowedvalues: ECOG Performance Status 0|ECOG Performance Status 1|ECOG Performance Status 2|ECOG Performance Status 2 or Higher|ECOG Performance Status 3|ECOG Performance Status 4|ECOG Performance Status 5

col.name: feces_phenotype_value
description: Value(s) corresponding to `feces_phenotype` measurements.

col.name: tumor_size_measurement
description: Tumor size measurement from clinical assessment or resected specimen (NCIT:C106303).

col.name: tumor_size_residual_measurement
description: Residual tumor size measurement after treatment/procedure (NCIT:C198194).

col.name: uncurated_metadata
description: Additional free-text metadata not represented by existing fields.
